role: Scheduler and aggregator — builds bot_status.json every 60 seconds for dashboard
rules: Aggregate all status files into bot_status.json every 60 seconds
Include instruction_version for each bot (read from instructions/<botname>.json)
Compute MEGA_IQ from spike_iq.json (or last known value if spike hasn't run yet)
Compute zone_activity: count of bots per zone that ran in last 10 minutes
Include training_count (line count of training.jsonl) and memory_count (row count of memory.db)
Include gemini_last_guidance: last Gemini strategic note from gemini_strategist status
